hero.headline: Building ambitious brands with
hero.sub: Zenova unifies design, development, marketing, and startup support into one seamless partnership — guiding ambitious modern businesses from strategy to launch and beyond.

cta.title: Got an idea?
cta.sub: A quick 30-minute call. No pitch, just your project.

faqs.q: How are you different from an agency?
faqs.a: One team handles design, build, and growth. No handoffs between vendors — same people from start to finish.

faqs.q: How long is a typical project?
faqs.a: 6 to 10 weeks for a build. Many clients stay on monthly for ongoing growth work.

faqs.q: Do we own the code and designs?
faqs.a: Yes. Everything sits in your accounts from day one — your GitHub, your Figma, your domain.
Flat fee per phase for builds. Flat monthly fee for ongoing work. No hourly billing.

faqs.q: Can you work with our team?
faqs.a: Yes. We often plug into existing teams and follow your conventions.
Usually 1 to 2 weeks after our intro call.

faqSection.title: Common
faqSection.sub: If you don't see your question here, just ask.

testimonials.quote: They replaced three of our vendors. One team, one channel, one invoice.
testimonials.name: Maya Okafor

testimonials.quote: A working prototype in eleven days. Best momentum we've had in years.
testimonials.name: Daniel Reyes

testimonials.quote: We came in for a site. We left with a full growth plan and real pipeline.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair

testimonials.quote: The cleanest handoff we've ever seen. Our team picked it up the next morning.
testimonials.name: Jonas Weber

testimonials.quote: Traffic up 4x. CAC down a third. They run growth like a product team.
testimonials.name: Aisha Mensah

testimonials.quote: Most agencies sell a deck. Zenova built us a system and taught us how to run it.
testimonials.name: Leo Castelli

testimonialsSection.title: What our users
testimonialsSection.sub: Real feedback from the teams and founders we've partnered with — across branding, product, and growth.

process.title: A simple process,
process.sub: Four phases in constant motion. Select one to see what happens inside it.

steps.title: Discover
steps.blurb: A working session to align on your goals, audience, and what success looks like.

steps.title: Design
steps.blurb: Brand, layout, and product design in one shared file. You see what we see, every day.

steps.title: Build
steps.blurb: We build it in small pieces with weekly demos. Code is yours, written to be easy to maintain.

steps.title: Grow
steps.blurb: After launch we stay involved. Monthly cycles of marketing, SEO, and content to build on what we shipped.

values.title: One team, start to finish
values.blurb: The people you meet on day one are the same people on day ninety. No handoffs.

values.title: Build, then talk
values.blurb: We ship working things, not decks about working things.

values.title: Outcomes over output
values.blurb: Every project ends with one number we agreed to move. We share it either way.

timeline.what: First long-term client. Growth becomes a core practice.
Working with 8 active clients across 3 continents.

footer.tagline: A small team that designs, builds, and grows modern businesses.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zenova collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website and services.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body:
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a contact form, subscribe to updates, or communicate with us.

This may include your name, email address, company, and any details you choose to share about your project.

sections.heading: How we use your information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to respond to your enquiries, deliver our services, and improve your experience. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences and understand how our site is used. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@zenova.agency.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Zenova website and services. By using our site, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Use of our services
sections.body: You agree to use our website and services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: Unless otherwise stated, all content on this site is the property of Zenova. Work produced for clients is transferred to them per the terms of each engagement.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: Our services are provided on an "as is" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Zenova is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of our site.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at hello@zenova.agency.
